channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in CSS (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in CSS nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 AbdelStark/awesome-jepa (120 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: AbdelStark

📝 Repository: AbdelStark/awesome-jepa

📄 Descrizione: Curated resources for JEPA (Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture) world models and self-supervised learning

⭐ Stelle: 120

🍴 Forks: 4

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-09T08:04:50Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-14T18:01:01Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 metamask-eth/metamask-desktop (72 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: metamask-eth

📝 Repository: metamask-eth/metamask-desktop

📄 Descrizione: 🖥️ The MetaMask Desktop app is a companion crypto wallet app that improves the overall performance of the MetaMask Extension Flask build

⭐ Stelle: 72

🍴 Forks: 9

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

🏷️ Topics: bitcoin bitcoin-wallet btc-wallet crypto cryptocurrency cryptowallet ethereum ethereum-wallet javascript machine-learning metamask-desktop metamask-io nodejs npm python secure-wallet solana typescript wallet web3

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-11T13:17:13Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-16T11:27:07Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 m1ckc3s/project-fathom (66 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: m1ckc3s

📝 Repository: m1ckc3s/project-fathom

📄 Descrizione: Tiny React sandbox proving you can fire native iOS haptics from a plain web page (no app) using the WebKit <input switch> control — verified on-device, works after the iOS 26.5 patch.

⭐ Stelle: 66

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-06T01:12:53Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-11T12:27:02Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 yangdada863/aimy-sikll (18 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: yangdada863

📝 Repository: yangdada863/aimy-sikll

📄 Descrizione: aimy-skill 是一个轻量级、可嵌入 AI Agent 的渗透测试辅助技能，专为授权环境下的自动化信息收集和基础漏洞探测设计。它可以被 AI 助手（如 AutoGPT、LangChain 应用）调用，也可以独立命令行运行。

⭐ Stelle: 18

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-02T13:46:57Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-08T01:09:57Z
